ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the property is located */,
  "total_sqft" REAL /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of property */,
  "last_sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the last sale transaction of the property */,
  "parking_type" TEXT /* Type of parking available */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot */,
  "views" TEXT /* Views from the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "co_date" TEXT /* Date of the certificate of occupancy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_last_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_sale_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the region is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sold_price" REAL /* Sold price of the property */,
  "price_per_sqft" REAL /* Price per square foot */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent who handled the sale */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., cash, mortgage) */,
  "financing_terms" TEXT /* Financing terms of the sale */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buying_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent representing the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyers_buying_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("buying_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "selling_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent representing the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sellers_selling_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("selling_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the agent belongs to */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the broker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the broker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the broker */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "average_sold_price" REAL /* Average sold price of properties in the region */,
  "average_price_per_sqft" REAL /* Average price per square foot in the region */,
  "median_sold_price" REAL /* Median sold price of properties in the region */,
  "median_price_per_sqft" REAL /* Median price per square foot in the region */,
  "number_of_sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales transactions in the region */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average days on market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
